prompt: A photorealistic, candid shot of two young Asian women shopping inside a tightly packed {argument name="setting" default="vintage clothing store"}. The woman in the foreground has brown hair in a ponytail and is wearing a {argument name="foreground outfit" default="white ribbed crop top and distressed denim shorts"} with a beige shoulder bag. She is holding up and examining a {argument name="item being examined" default="blue satin souvenir jacket with intricate embroidery"}. Beside her, the second woman has dark hair with bangs, wears {argument name="background outfit" default="a white t-shirt and denim overalls"}, and is smiling warmly at the jacket. The store is filled with dense racks of colorful vintage clothes under warm, atmospheric lighting, with a wooden sign reading "VINTAGE" visible in the background. Shallow depth of field focuses on the women and the jacket.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实、自然的抓拍照片，展示了两位年轻亚裔女性在拥挤的 {argument name="setting" default="复古服装店"} 内购物的场景。前景中的女性留着棕色马尾辫，身穿 {argument name="foreground outfit" default="白色罗纹短款上衣和磨损感牛仔短裤"}，背着一个米色单肩包。她正举起并仔细查看一件 {argument name="item being examined" default="带有精致刺绣的蓝色缎面纪念夹克"}。她身旁的第二位女性留着齐刘海，身穿 {argument name="background outfit" default="白色 T 恤和牛仔背带裤"}，正对着夹克露出温暖的笑容。店内挂满了色彩缤纷的复古服装，在温暖的氛围灯光下，背景中可以看到一块写着“VINTAGE”的木牌。浅景深效果聚焦于两位女性和那件夹克。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古商店购物场景：一张写实的女性生活方式照片，展示了两位女性在拥挤的复古服装店中购物的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
